calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-19-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Donald Mahnke, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Samantha Koopersmith, Esq.213-624-2500 Squire Patton Boggs LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Argued. Ms. Koopersmith contests the tentative ruling. Mr. Mahnke responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JUAN JIMENEZ'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

PLAINTIFF JUAN SEBASTIAN RIOS JIMINEZ' (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OF "JIMINEZ) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE FROM DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "JIMINEZ") TO HIS REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (RFP) NOS 1 - 37 IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:
(1) DEFENDANT'S BOILERPLATE OBJECTIONS TO RFP NOS 1 - 37 ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT FOR AN ASSSERTION OF ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE. IF DEFENDANT SEEKS TO WITHHOLD ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT ON THE GROUND OF ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE, DEFENDANT WILL INDENTIFY THE DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY TO ENABLE PLAINTIFF TO CHALLENGE THE CLAIM.
(2) AS TO DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO RFP NOS 1 -5, 7, 8, 10 - 15 THE PORTION OF THE RESPONSES THAT READS "TO WHICH NO OBJECTION HAS BEEN MADE" IS ORDERED STRICKEN AND DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, WITHOUT OBJECTION, COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY THE REQUESTS, SUBJECT SOLELY TO THE OBJECTION REFERRED TO IN PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE..
(3) AS TO DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO RFP NOS 17 - 18 DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHI(N FIFTEEN CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, WITHOUT OBJECTION COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS FOR THE PERIOD COMMENCING ON JANUARY 1, 2021 TO PRESENT, SUBJECT SOLELY TO THE OBJECTION REFERRED TO IN PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE.
(4) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO RFP NOS 34 - 37 SUBJECT SOLELY TO THE OBJECTION REFERRED TO IN PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE.
(5) PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS DENIED AS TO RFP NOS 6, 9, 16, 19 - 33.
(6) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NOT MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ANY PARTY TO THIS LITIGATION.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULIING, SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT at rennepar85@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

PLAINTIFF JUAN JIMENEZ NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE.(ADDED FOR TENTATIVE RULING ONLY, PART 2 OF 2)
